meaning_cn: 随便你。 / 请便 / 尽管去
trap_x: 字面意思：把自己打晕/击倒
trap_check: 真正意思：随便你 / 请便 / 尽管去（你开心就好）

examples.source: The Office US S7E19 · 办公室 第七季
examples.en: "There's cake in the break room. Knock yourself out."

examples.source: Brooklyn Nine-Nine S2E04 · 神烦警探 第二季
examples.en: "You want to dig through ten years of paperwork? Knock yourself out."

examples.source: Parks and Recreation S5E02 · 公园与游憩 第五季
examples.en: "If you want to review all 200 pages, knock yourself out."
